name: Vegetable Gratin
recipeIngredient: Salad dressing (oil and vinegar) (up to 2 tablespoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat electric oven to 375°F.
2. Spray a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan with olive oil spray.
3. Cut vegetables into 1/4-inch slices crosswise.
4. In the prepared pan, arrange vegetables alternately, overlapping slices.
5. Lightly spray vegetables with olive oil spray.
6. Season with salt, pepper, and garlic powder (if using).
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese (if using).
8. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and brush with salad dressing (up to 2 tablespoons). Makes 8 servings.
